meaning: n.船首三角帆,起重机的臂,挺杆vi.移转,踌躇不前,停止不动
examples: Some frequent users will jib at a paywall, but some will fork out.
Avast! Belay the port jib, and scupper the mains 'l on the poop deck!
Tiketitan heeled ominously, then accelerated to 13 knots, overtaking more cautious sailors who remained under jib and mainsail.
Piggybacking on the popularity of Elf Yourself, Amazon has partnered with Jib Jab to create video gift cards.
